creator: ivaudrey@test.nemko.ltd.uk
text:
The Apache 1.2.1 port does not install either the HTML documentation
or the man pages included in the tarball.

How-To-Repeat: Make the port, then

HTML:      ls /usr/local/share/doc
           find / -name 'new_features_1_2.html'

Man Pages: man 8 httpd
           man 1 htpasswd
